nasb.text: “Son of man, set your face toward Teman, and speak out against the south and prophesy against the forest land of the Negev,

esv.text: “Son of man, set your face toward the southland;  preach against the south, and prophesy against the forest land in the Negeb.

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要面向南方，向南面發言，說預言攻擊南地田野的樹林，

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要面向南方，说预言斥责南地的树林。
